```{r}
# Set up
rm(list = ls())

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(svglite)

# Color palette
base_pal <- c(
  "#008888", "#880088", "#000080", "#E69F00",
  "#009E73", "#56B4E9", "#F0E442", "#D55E00",
  "#CC79A7", "#117733", "#882255", "#332288",
  "#44AA99", "#999933", "#DDCC77", "#AA4499",
  "#88CCEE"
)

# Input data
file_path <- "Darst_Menni_Dunn_Chen_intersection_annotated_dedup.xlsx"
dat <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Sheet1") %>%
  select(
    Original_Met_Name,
    `GF_vs_CONV_Different?`,
    top_20_pc_gutsy,
    included_in_final_panel,
    HMDB_class,
    Order
  )

clean_col <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x[is.na(x) | x == ""] <- "(missing)"
  x
}

dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(Original_Met_Name, `GF_vs_CONV_Different?`,
             top_20_pc_gutsy, included_in_final_panel, HMDB_class),
           clean_col),
    Order       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Order)),
    alluvium_id = row_number()
  )

# Copy data for last column
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(Original_Met_Name_end = Original_Met_Name)

# Compute rank for the last column
met_order <- dat %>%
  arrange(Order) %>%
  pull(Original_Met_Name) %>%
  unique()

rank_map <- tibble(
  Original_Met_Name = met_order,
  rank = seq_along(met_order)
)

# Zero-pad width alphabetical ordering
rank_width <- max(2L, nchar(as.character(length(met_order))))

# Reshape to long (lodes) and create axis-specific stratum with hidden rank on the mirror
axis_levels <- c("Original_Met_Name",
                 "GF_vs_CONV_Different?",
                 "top_20_pc_gutsy",
                 "included_in_final_panel",
                 "Original_Met_Name_end")

lodes <- dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(axis_levels),
    names_to = "axis",
    values_to = "stratum_raw"
  ) %>%
  mutate(axis = factor(axis, levels = axis_levels),
         ord  = Order) %>%
  # bring in rank for metabolites (will be NA for non-metabolite strata like Yes/No)
  left_join(rank_map, by = c("stratum_raw" = "Original_Met_Name")) %>%
  mutate(
    # stratum used for plotting; prepend ranked prefix ONLY on mirrored axis
    stratum_plot = ifelse(
      axis == "Original_Met_Name_end" & !is.na(rank),
      paste0(sprintf(paste0("R%0", rank_width, "d|"), rank), stratum_raw),
      stratum_raw
    ),
    # fade the mirrored strata boxes to indicate repetition
    alpha_stratum = ifelse(axis == "Original_Met_Name_end", 0.25, 1)
  )

# Palette for classes present
classes <- sort(unique(lodes$HMDB_class))
pal_named <- setNames(rep(base_pal, length.out = length(classes)), classes)

# Plot
p <- ggplot(lodes,
            aes(x = axis,
                stratum = stratum_plot,
                alluvium = alluvium_id,
                y = 1,
                fill = HMDB_class,
                order = ord)) +
  geom_alluvium(alpha = 0.6, knot.pos = 0.4) +
  geom_stratum(aes(alpha = alpha_stratum),
               width = 0.25, color = "grey30") +
  scale_alpha_identity() +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum",
            aes(label = after_stat(gsub("^R\\d+\\|", "", stratum))),
            size = 3, vjust = -0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_named, drop = FALSE, na.value = "#BFBFBF") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Matched\nMicrobial Met",
                              "GF vs CONV\nDifferent?",
                              "Top 20%\nGUTSY",
                              "Included in\nFinal Panel",
                              "Matched\nMicrobial Met")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Alluvial Plot of Metabolite Selections",
       subtitle = "Flow: Original_Met_Name → GF_vs_CONV_Different? → top_20_pc_gutsy → included_in_final_panel → Original_Met_Name",
       fill = "HMDB Class") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )

# Save
ggsave("Figure_1_prelim_version.svg", p,
       width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```
